description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~116k production LoC across 179 files (incl. NEW `rust/sele4n-hal/src/per_cpu_stats.rs` from SM1.I.4 + `SeLe4n/Kernel/Architecture/TlbiForSharing.lean` from SM1.E.4); ~22k test LoC across 30 suites (`tests/SmpFoundationsSuite.lean` extended at SM1.I with +6 surface anchors + 5 runtime assertions covering idle-wait + per-core stats markers); 3,370 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom). Rust HAL: 592 host unit tests + 1 ignored (`sm1g3_cross_core_kprintln_stress` placeholder) (was 510 pre-SM1.I; +82 SM1.I tests across per_cpu_stats/trap/cpu/ffi/smp modules including audit-pass-2/3/4 defense-in-depth + wrap + truncation + invocation + race-fix tests) + 94 ABI conformance tests.

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.

**Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.31.4 → v0.31.5 → v0.31.6 → v0.31.7 → v0.31.8 → v0.32.x → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0 (Foundations & honesty patches) COMPLETE** at v0.31.3; **SM1.A (PSCI completion)** at v0.31.3; **SM1.B (Per-CPU data + TPIDR_EL1, closes SMP-M4)** at v0.31.4; **SM1.C (Secondary-core full init, closes SMP-C2)** at v0.31.5; **SM1.D (DTB cmdline + Phase 5)** at v0.31.6; **SM1.E (IS-variant TLBI broadcast) + SM1.F (GICD_SGIR-based SGI primitive surface) + SM1.G (per-core kprintln macro + UartLock SMP audit) + SM1.H (QEMU SMP integration tests)** all LANDED at v0.31.7; **SM1.I (Miscellaneous HAL improvements — SM5 landing seams: `handle_irq_per_core`, per-core stats, idle-wait FFI, SEV/WFE docs, cross-core tests) LANDED at v0.31.8 — closes SM1 acceptance gate**. WS-SM SM1 CLOSED at v0.31.8 with all nine sub-phases LANDED (SM1.A through SM1.I; 61 total sub-tasks across SM1.A=8, SM1.B=7, SM1.C=12, SM1.D=6, SM1.E=5, SM1.F=8, SM1.G=4, SM1.H=5, SM1.I=6). Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM0 sub-plan: [`SMP_FOUNDATIONS_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_FOUNDATIONS_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** Next phases: SM2 (verified lock primitives) + SM3..SM9 → closure cut at v1.0.0.
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
